goal: forall(x0: Complex, x1: Complex) { norm_distance(x0)(x1) = Real.0 implies x0 = x1 }

p.c: exists(k0: Complex, k1: Complex) { norm_distance(k0, k1) = Real.0 and k1 != k0 }
let w0: Complex satisfy { exists(k0: Complex) { norm_distance(w0, k0) = Real.0 and k0 != w0 } }
let w1: Complex satisfy { norm_distance(w0, w1) = Real.0 and w0 != w1 }
norm_distance(w0, w1) = Real.0
let w2: Complex satisfy { norm_distance(w0, w2) = Real.0 and w0 != w2 }
norm_distance(w0, w2) = Real.0
function[T0: lib(normed_add_comm_group).NormedAddCommGroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { norm_distance[T0](x0, x1) = Real.0 = (x0 = x1) }[Complex](w0, w2)
w2 != w0 or norm_distance(w0, w2) = Real.0
norm_distance(w0, w2) != Real.0 or w2 = w0
exists(k0: Complex) { norm_distance(k0, k0) != Real.0 }
let w0: Complex satisfy { norm_distance(w0, w0) != Real.0 }
function[T0: lib(normed_add_comm_group).NormedAddCommGroup](x0: T0) { Real.0 = norm_distance[T0](x0, x0) }[Complex](w0)

goal: forall(x0: Complex, x1: Complex) { norm_distance(x0)(x1) = norm_distance(x1)(x0) }

p.c: exists(k0: Complex, k1: Complex) { norm_distance(k1, k0) != norm_distance(k0, k1) }
let w0: Complex satisfy { exists(k0: Complex) { norm_distance(k0, w0) != norm_distance(w0, k0) } }
let w1: Complex satisfy { norm_distance(w1, w0) != norm_distance(w0, w1) }
let w2: Complex satisfy { norm_distance(w2, w0) != norm_distance(w0, w2) }
function[T0: lib(normed_add_comm_group).NormedAddCommGroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { norm_distance[T0](x0, x1) = norm_distance[T0](x1, x0) }[Complex](w0, w2)

goal: forall(x0: Complex, x1: Complex, x2: Complex) { norm_distance(x0)(x2) <= norm_distance(x0)(x1) + norm_distance(x1)(x2) }

p.c: exists(k0: Complex, k1: Complex, k2: Complex) { not norm_distance(k0, k2) <= norm_distance(k0, k1) + norm_distance(k1, k2) }
let w0: Complex satisfy { exists(k0: Complex, k1: Complex) { not norm_distance(w0, k1) <= norm_distance(w0, k0) + norm_distance(k0, k1) } }
let w1: Complex satisfy { exists(k2: Complex) { not norm_distance(w0, k2) <= norm_distance(w0, w1) + norm_distance(w1, k2) } }
let w2: Complex satisfy { not norm_distance(w0, w2) <= norm_distance(w0, w1) + norm_distance(w1, w2) }
let w3: Complex satisfy { exists(k3: Complex) { not norm_distance(w0, k3) <= norm_distance(w0, w3) + norm_distance(w3, k3) } }
let w4: Complex satisfy { not norm_distance(w0, w4) <= norm_distance(w0, w3) + norm_distance(w3, w4) }
let w5: Complex satisfy { not norm_distance(w0, w5) <= norm_distance(w0, w3) + norm_distance(w3, w5) }
function[T0: lib(normed_add_comm_group).NormedAddCommGroup](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { norm_distance[T0](x0, x1) <= norm_distance[T0](x0, x2) + norm_distance[T0](x2, x1) }[Complex](w0, w5, w3)
function[T0: lib(normed_add_comm_group).NormedAddCommGroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { (x0 - x1).norm = norm_distance[T0](x0, x1) }[Complex](a, b)

goal: complex_converges_to(z, w) = (converges_to(re_seq(z), w.re) and converges_to(im_seq(z), w.im))

p.c: function(x0: Nat -> Complex, x1: Complex) { (converges_to(re_seq(x0), x1.re) and converges_to(im_seq(x0), x1.im)) = complex_converges_to(x0, x1) }(z, w)

goal: exists(k0: Real) { k0.is_positive and k0 + k0 < eps }
exists(k0: Nat) { tail_bound(re_seq(z), w.re, k0, half) }
exists(k0: Nat) { tail_bound(re_seq(z), w.re, k0, half) }
exists(k0: Nat) { tail_bound(im_seq(z), w.im, k0, half) }
exists(k0: Nat) { tail_bound(im_seq(z), w.im, k0, half) }

p.c: function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { (x0 - x1).abs < x2 = x0.is_close(x1, x2) }(re_seq(z, i), w.re, half)

function(x0: Nat) { not n <= x0 or z(x0).distance(w) < eps }(i)

n <= w0
not z(w0).distance(w) < eps
function(x0: Nat) { not n <= x0 or z(x0).distance(w) < eps }(w0)

goal: exists(k0: Nat) { metric_tail_bound(z, w, k0, eps) }

p.c: function(x0: Nat) { not metric_tail_bound(z, w, x0, eps) }(n)

function[T0: MetricSpace](x0: Nat -> T0, x1: T0) { not forall(x2: Real) { not x2.is_positive or exists(k0: Nat) { metric_tail_bound[T0](x0, x1, k0, x2) } } or tendsto_metric[T0](x0, x1) }[Complex](z, w)

goal: exists(k0: Nat) { metric_tail_bound(z, w, k0, eps) }
metric_tail_bound(z, w, n, eps) and n <= i
